titleStmt.title: SII 20.93: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 93. (B.K. No. 71 of 1936-37.) MALGHĀṆ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the left wall of Rāmaliṅga temple.

summary.p: This undated inscription is in Kannaḍa and Sanskrit languages. It records that the king granted several lands out of the daśavanda and other lands set apart for himself, for the renovation of, and worship in, the temples of Divākarēśvara and Sōmēśvara, for a water-shed, a tank, a well and an educational institution for children, attached to the temple of Divākarēśvara at Mallagāṇa which he had given away to Divākarabhaṭṭōpādhyāya as a sarvvanamasya gift. The latter was the son of Śaṅkarabhaṭṭa and grandson of Vāsudēvadvivēdi-bhaṭṭa, and Dēvalakabbā was his wife. The record contains an eulogy of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[© svasti] . jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnata daṁṣṭrāgraviśrāṁ
tabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . gadya . svasti samastajagatprasūtabhagavatō brahmaṇaḥ putra syātrērnnē
1) The rest is worn out and effaced.

trasamutpannasya yāminīkāminīlalāmabhūtasya sōmasyānvayē satyatyāga śauryyādiguṇanilayaḥ kēvala
nijadhvajinījāvakṣapitapratipakṣakṣitīśavaṁśaḥ śrīmānasti cāḻukyavaṁśaḥ . Ā vaṁśadoḷ . kaṁda . vanajākṣaṁ manucaritaṁ dhanapati sa
mavittanenisi rājyadoḷiḻdaṁ vinayayutanakhilabhūjanavinutaṁ śrīviṣṇumūrtti jayasiṁha nṛpa . vṛtta . yasya
pratāpaśikhitāpabhayātpalāyya kvāpyāśrayaṁ sukhakaraṁ bhuvanēṣvalabdhvā prāpyaina mēva śaraṇaṁ ripavaḥ sukhēna ta
sthuḥ sa bhūpatirabhūjjayasiṁhadēvaḥ . kinca . nijānvayapradīpyāpi tailavaṁśavivarddhanaḥ siṁhōpyasau mṛ
gadṛśāṁ priya Ityadbhutaṁ mahat . kaṁda . Ā jayasiṁhanṛpaṁge tanūjaṁ cāḷukyarājaḥ bharadhaurēyaṁ rājēṁ
dracōḷagajamṛgarājaṁ traiḷōkyamallanāhavamallaṁ . vṛtta . caladiṁ dhāreyanūra dāḻduripi munnaṁ maṁḍavaṁ
goṁḍanērvvaladiṁ kaṁciyaneyde suṭṭu muḷisiṁdaṁ cōḷanaṁ koṁdu paṇdaleyaṁ koṁḍanaḻurkkeyujjayaniyaṁ dāḷiṭṭu suṭṭalli tō
ḷvaladiṁ beḷḷiya guṁḍugoṁḍanadaṭaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁ nṛpaṁ . Api ca . luṁṭākavaddripu purēṣvacaratpratāpaḥ kōpānaḷē
pyaśalabhāyata yasya cōḷaḥ sasvīyabāṁdhavaparigrahakalpavrikṣaḥ śrīmānnabhūnnṛpati rāhavamalladēvaḥ . kiṁ ca .
saṁkhyātuṁ hutakōṭihōmapaṭalīrddattāni dānāni vā kōlaṁ kōṭimukhōpyu dāramanasastasyāti śakraśriyaḥ śakyaṁ va
ktumiyattu tēna na hutaḥ yasminnadēśyāstyas yaddattanna na dānamasti tadasau viprō na yō tōṣitaḥ . sauṁndaryyasaṁpadaḥ sī
mā khaniḥ kāṁtērgguṇāspadaṁ tasya priyāgramahiṣī nāmnā bācaladēbyabhūt . tayōrabhūtsutaśrīmānsa
sōmēśvarabhūpatiḥ yaḥ kāṁtājanadṛṁjnīlanīrajāmṛtadīdhitiḥ . tayōrabhūttanū jōnyō vikramādityabhūpatiḥ
krāṁtāribhūmiḥ śārjgēva dēvakīvasudēvayōḥ . tatastayōrjjēṣṭhaḥ sōmēśvara kumāraḥ kramōyamiti pitrā da
ttaṁ rājyamakarōt . tasyānaṁtaraṁ . kaṁda . ballāḷtanadiṁ ripunṛparellaranēkāṁgadiṁda meṟagisi dharaṇīvallabhanādaṁ
tribhuvanamallaṁ cāḷukya vikramādityanṛpaṁ . vṛtta . muḷisiṁdaṁ raṭṭaraṁ tōrttaḻa duḷidu bhujāgarbbhadiṁ vīrasiṁhā
sanamaṁ pūṇdēṟidā tailapanṛpanavoludvṛttaraṁ duṣṭaraṁ durjjanaraṁ siṁhāsanadrōhara nuṟadiṟiduttuṁgamaṁ vīrasiṁhā
sanamaṁ nirbyājadiṁndēṟidanatuḷabaḷaṁ rāyabeṁkoḷvadēvaṁ . sa bhāti pṛthivīśvara śrayati yatra siṁhāsanaṁ
śrayaṁti ripavō pūgaṁ vṛkavarāhaṁ siṁhāsanaṁ vṛṣēṇa sakalaiḥ padaisthitavatō rvvarā pāvitā prajā ca nikhiḷā
mudaṁ sadayamajvarā pāvitā . Aribhūpāḷakaratthartamaṁ kavaḻdu koṁḍādartthadiṁdaṁ tuḷāpuruṣārōhaṇamu
ddhatakṣitiparaṁ beṁkoṁḍu koṁḍāneyiṁ dviradārōhaṇamātmabāhubaladiṁ siṁhāsanā rōhaṇaṁ dorevettiḻda nṛpēṁ
drarājarbhbhuvanadoḷu cāḻukyarāmaṁbaraṁ . cōḷō māḷavabhūpatiśca carituṁ trastau svadurggaṁ layādanvabdaṁ gajavājinaḥ ka
ratayā datvā nijāpairjjanaiḥ sēvētē praṇatau yadaṁghriyugaḷaṁ tasyāsamāṁ vīra tāṁ kōsminvarṇayituṁ kaviḥ prabhavati śrīvi
kramakṣmāpatēḥ . yēna prērita bhaṭṭaputrakavaṭuḥ prāpa ttripuryyāḥ patiṁ hṛtvā paśyata Ēva tasya kariṇō muktā
śca sālankṛtiḥ kalyāṇaṁ karibhirggahaṁ maṇigaṇairāpūrayannudyataḥ kuryyātkasya na bhītivismayamudaḥ tasya pratā
pānaḷaḥ . Eseva sakavarṣamaṁ māṇisi vikramavarṣameṁdu tannaya pesaraṁ vasumati negaḷcida sāhasigaṁ jagadēka
dāni dharmmavinōda . Api ca . yaddōrḻdaṁḍaḥ pratibhavadarikṣmābhṛtāṁ kāladaṁḍō ya syāpyāsītkarasarasijaṁ yāca
tāṁ kalpavṛkṣaḥ mṛṣṭānnāśairadhigatamudāṁ kōṭiśō brāhmaṇānāmāśīrvvāda dhvaniravirataṁ yasya cāśrāvi gēhē . svasti
samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḻukyābha
raṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddamāna mācaṁdrārkatāraṁ saluttamire .
brahmōdbhavasyāṁgirasānvavāyē vṛddhōgraṇīrggōtrakṛtāmṛṣīṇāṁ . Āsīdanū cānatamastapasvī nāmnā bharadvāja Iti
prasiddhaḥ . vaṁśē tadīyējani vāsudēvadvivēdibhaṭṭaḥ śrutimaṁtrasiddhaḥ yaḥ svāmiyātrājanavastrahartṟūṁ
ścōrāṁstṛṇaṁ lāvayatisma śastraiḥ . tattanayaḥ śrutinilayaḥ saṁśayitasamasta dharmmaniścayanilayaḥ . nā
mnā śaṁkarabhaṭṭaśca padaprativādisaṁghadhānyagharaṭṭaḥ . vaivāhikāgnirnna kadāpi yasya prāṇaśyadājīvamanuṣṭhitiśca
gṛhyōktadharmmasya kimucyatēnyattatrāsti pāpasya na kōpi hētuḥ . Ēkōsti dō ṣōyamamutra dṛṣṭō yatkarmmaṣa
ṭkēdhikṛtōpi vidvānu Abhūrivittōpyakarōdanāsthāṁ pratigrahē karmmaṇi yājanē ca . tasyātmajaḥ sakalaśāstra
purāṇavēdī dēvēśvarārccanaparaḥ kṛtapūrttadharmaḥ rājyasthitāvanipatitrayapūji tō yaḥ śrīmānabhū
dguṇanidhiḥ sa divākarāryyaḥ . kiṁ ca . spṛśati gurunikaracaraṇaṁ spṛśati ca haradēva caraṇamamarābhyarccyaṁ manasā
pyasadācaraṇaṁ na spṛśati sa durjjanāsahanaḥ . Api ca . Artthō yasya dharāmarāmara pitṛvrātārccanā
rtthōbhavaddharmmaścāpyabhavattrisaptakulajāśēṣaprajōttārakaḥ kāmaḥ sadbahuputradaḥ kima paraṁ ya
ssadbhirityucyatē smarttavyasya cirāyurutsavavidhau lakṣmyāyuṣīrvṛddhayē . bhāryyā dēvalakabbā tasya svamu
khāvalōkijanaśubhadābhūt . dharmmēṣu vasiṣṭhamunēḥ pārśvasthāruṁdhatīva vima ḷēṁdumukhī . Anupamaguṇa
bhūṣiteyaṁ munijanadēvadvijārccanaikabra (.) teyaṁ janalōcanacaṁdrikeyaṁ manu jarggaṁ pogaḷalaḷave dēvāṁbikeya .
patyā kṛtēṣu dharmmēṣu patnyā hyarddhaṁ phalaṁ smṛtaṁ taddivākaradharmmēṣu dēva lārddhaphalōcitā . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlasaṁpannar . sakalajagatprathitanirmmaḷa bharadvāja kulōtpannar pratidinakriya
māṇapaṁcamahāyajñapavitrīkṛtakāyar . khugvēdādhyayanaprāvīṇyaprasāditaśrōtriya nikāyar . Uttīrṇnasa
mastasmṛtipurāṇaratnākarar . haracaraṇasarōjamadhukararnnāmādisamastapraśastisahitarappa śrīmaddivākarabhaṭṭō
pādhyāyargge śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaru tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁ sarvvanamasyamāgi haḷḷiverasi kālaṁ karccidhārāpū
rvvakaṁ koṭṭa mallagāṇadalu tāṁvu brāhmaṇarige bhūmidānavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ Upakeyaṁgaḷaṁ tettuṁbaṁtāgi koṭṭa vṛtti 94
ma 10 Alli tāṁvu māḍida dharmmaṁgaḷellavācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevaṁtāgi tamma daśavaṁdada mānyaṁ mattarmmūnūṟaṟuvattu maiydu
na rēvaṇaṁ hattu mānasa brāhmaṇargge mūligageyiyāgi koṭṭa nūṟu mattarkkeyyuma ninnūṟu gadyāṇa ponnaṁ koṭṭu koṁḍa
mattarnnūṟu Antu mānyaṁ mattaru nālnūṟaṟuvattaṟoḷage biṭṭa mattaru nūṟa nālvattu Alli divākarēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōga
kkaviṭṭage sōtevesada khaṁḍasphaṭitaṁgaḷaṁ māḍaluṁ biṭṭa māṇikēśvarada mattaraṟuvattu sōmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkavalliya khaṁḍa
sphuṭitaṁgaḷaṁ māḍalu biṭṭa mattarirppattu vināyakabhaṭṭara dharmmētadāḷgaḷa jīvitakke bāviya khaṁḍasphaṭitakkaṁ biṭṭa mattarirppattu
keṟeyaṁ paḍisalisalu biṭṭa mattarirppattu bāviyuṁ dēgulamumaṁ kāvāḷiṁge mattaru hattu Aṟavaṁṭagege biṭṭa mattaru
hattu . somēśvaradēvariṁ mūḍalu biṭṭa tōṁṭaṁ mattaroṁdu savaḷa dina saṁje maṭhada purāṇamuṁ baiyge divākarēśvaradēvaralliya pu
rāṇamaṁ bālaśikṣegaṁ nyāsada vakkhāṇakkaṁ vṛttiya bhūmiyoḷage biṭṭa bhaṭṭavṛttiyoṁdu mahājanaṁgaḻu sa
rvvabādhāparihāravāgi kādūḍuvaru . dēvarige biṭṭa maneya nivēśanaveraḍu baṇaṁbeya nivēśanavoṁduvare . bhaṭṭavṛ
ttiyavarige maneya nivēśanavoṁdu baṇaṁbeya nivēśanadalli Arddha . Ī dharmmaṁgaḷellavaṟalli huṭṭidartthadoḷage
Alliyalliya bīyaṁgaḷedu keṟeya keyya dravyaṁ poṟagāgi mikkudanelliyādaḍaṁ khaṁḍa sphuṭitaṁgaḷaṁ mā
ḍisuvudu . Ī dharmmaṁgaḷellamanūra prabhugaḷuṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ nāḍanāḷvarasugaḷuṁ tappade pratipāḷi
suvudu . Ī dharmmakkāvanānuṁ tappidavanaṁ śāsisuvudu . Ī dharmmaṁgaḷanāva nōrvvaṁ rakṣisidanappaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu
ttamarappa bāhmaṇargge sāsirakavileyaṁ dānaṁgeyda puṇyavakku . Ī dharmmamanaḷidavaṁ vāraṇāsiyalu sāsira ka
vileyuṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda pāpavakku . svaṁ dātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pā
lanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁvarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
